message:
test(transport): add E2E tests for Stdio NDJSON and SSE streaming [bd-2kv]

Stdio NDJSON tests (bd-swyn):
- Multiple messages in sequence
- Request/response flow
- Empty line handling
- Unicode content
- Large messages (100KB)
- Notifications
- Error responses
- Malformed JSON handling
- Bidirectional flow
- Two-phase send patterns

SSE streaming tests (bd-1pua):
- Connection establishment
- Event stream sequences
- Resumability with Last-Event-ID
- Graceful disconnect on EOF
- Server and client transport flows
- Retry hints
- Multi-line data handling
- Unicode in events

All tests pass, clippy/fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
